name: United States-Mexico-Canada Agreement (USMCA)
description: Replaces NAFTA; covers trade in goods, services, digital trade, IP, and labor standards.

name: Comprehensive and Progressive Agreement for Trans-Pacific Partnership (CPTPP)
description: Major multilateral agreement covering 11 Pacific Rim nations; successor to the TPP.

name: Regional Comprehensive Economic Partnership (RCEP)
description: World's largest trade bloc by GDP; covers goods, services, investment, and e-commerce.

name: EU-UK Trade and Cooperation Agreement (TCA)
description: Post-Brexit trade deal covering goods, services, fisheries, and regulatory cooperation.

name: African Continental Free Trade Area (AfCFTA)
description: Largest FTA by number of countries; aims to create a single continental market for goods and services.

name: ASEAN Free Trade Area (AFTA)
description: Reduces tariffs among ASEAN members; foundation of broader ASEAN economic integration.

name: Mercosur
description: South American customs union with free movement of goods, services, and people.

name: Gulf Cooperation Council (GCC) Common Market
description: Common market allowing free movement of goods, services, capital, and citizens.

name: Greater Arab Free Trade Area (GAFTA)
description: Free trade area among Arab League members aimed at eliminating tariffs on goods.

name: EU-Japan Economic Partnership Agreement (EPA)
description: Covers nearly all trade between EU and Japan; one of the largest bilateral trade deals.

name: EU-Canada Comprehensive Economic and Trade Agreement (CETA)
description: Provisionally applied since 2017; covers goods, services, investment, and government procurement.

name: EU-South Korea Free Trade Agreement
description: First EU FTA with an Asian country; significantly reduced tariffs on both sides.

name: EU-Singapore Free Trade Agreement (EUSFTA)
description: Covers trade in goods, services, and investment; gateway to ASEAN markets.

name: EU-Vietnam Free Trade Agreement (EVFTA)
description: Eliminates over 99% of tariffs; includes commitments on labor rights and environment.

name: EU-Mexico Global Agreement (modernised)
description: Updated version of the 2000 EU-Mexico agreement; concluded in 2023, pending ratification.

name: EU-Mercosur Association Agreement
description: Political agreement reached in 2019 and finalized in 2024; pending ratification.

name: EU-Chile Advanced Framework Agreement
description: Modernised agreement concluded in 2023; successor to the 2003 EU-Chile Association Agreement.

name: EU-New Zealand Free Trade Agreement
description: Concluded in 2023; pending ratification — will eliminate tariffs on most goods.

name: EU-Australia Free Trade Agreement
description: Negotiations ongoing since 2018; stalled over agricultural market access issues.

name: EU-India Free Trade Agreement
description: Relaunched in 2022 after a decade-long pause; covers goods, services, and investment.

name: EU-Indonesia Comprehensive Economic Partnership Agreement (CEPA)
description: Negotiations launched in 2016; ongoing discussions on goods, services, and sustainability.

name: US-South Korea Free Trade Agreement (KORUS)
description: One of the largest US bilateral FTAs; modernised in 2019 with updated auto and tariff provisions.

name: US-Australia Free Trade Agreement (AUSFTA)
description: Eliminates tariffs on the majority of goods; includes services, investment, and IP provisions.

name: US-Singapore Free Trade Agreement
description: Comprehensive agreement covering goods, services, financial services, and e-commerce.

name: US-Chile Free Trade Agreement
description: Eliminates tariffs on over 90% of goods immediately; includes investment and IP provisions.

name: US-Colombia Trade Promotion Agreement
description: Eliminated tariffs on most goods; includes labor and environmental provisions.

name: US-Peru Trade Promotion Agreement
description: Provides duty-free access for most products; includes IP and environmental commitments.

name: Dominican Republic-Central America-United States FTA (CAFTA-DR)
description: Multilateral agreement eliminating most tariffs on goods between the US and six Latin American nations.

name: US-Jordan Free Trade Agreement
description: First US FTA with an Arab country; covers goods, services, IP, and includes labor provisions.

name: US-Israel Free Trade Agreement
description: First US FTA ever; provides duty-free access for nearly all goods.

name: US-Bahrain Free Trade Agreement
description: Eliminates tariffs on most goods; covers services, IP, and investment.

name: US-Morocco Free Trade Agreement
description: US's first FTA with an African country; provides duty-free access for most goods.

name: US-Oman Free Trade Agreement
description: Eliminates most tariffs; covers goods, services, investment, and IP.

name: UK-Australia Free Trade Agreement
description: Eliminates all tariffs on goods; one of UK's first major post-Brexit deals.

name: UK-New Zealand Free Trade Agreement
description: Comprehensive agreement eliminating tariffs on all goods; includes digital trade provisions.

name: UK-Japan Comprehensive Economic Partnership Agreement (CEPA)
description: UK's first major post-Brexit deal; goes beyond the EU-Japan EPA in digital and data provisions.

name: UK-Singapore Free Trade Agreement
description: Comprehensive deal covering goods, services, digital trade, and green economy.

name: UK-India Free Trade Agreement
description: Concluded in May 2025 after three years of negotiations; one of UK's biggest post-Brexit trade deals.

name: UK-Gulf Cooperation Council (GCC) FTA
description: Negotiations ongoing since 2022 between UK and the six GCC member states.

name: China-ASEAN Free Trade Area (ACFTA)
description: One of the largest FTAs by population; upgraded multiple times, most recently in 2019.

name: China-Australia Free Trade Agreement (ChAFTA)
description: Eliminates or reduces tariffs on the majority of goods; covers services and investment.

name: China-New Zealand Free Trade Agreement
description: First FTA between China and a developed country; upgraded in 2021.

name: China-South Korea Free Trade Agreement
description: Covers goods, services, and investment between two major Asian economies.

name: China-Switzerland Free Trade Agreement
description: First FTA between China and a continental European country.

name: China-Iceland Free Trade Agreement
description: Comprehensive agreement covering goods, services, investment, and IP.

name: China-Chile Free Trade Agreement
description: First FTA between China and a Latin American country; upgraded in 2019.

name: China-Peru Free Trade Agreement
description: Covers goods, services, and investment; upgrade negotiations launched in 2019.

name: China-Pakistan Free Trade Agreement
description: Phase II entered into force in 2020 with deeper tariff cuts; part of CPEC strategy.

name: China-Georgia Free Trade Agreement
description: First FTA between China and a CIS country; provides zero tariffs on most goods.

name: China-Mauritius Free Trade Agreement
description: China's first FTA with an African country; covers goods and services.

name: China-Cambodia Free Trade Agreement
description: Eliminates tariffs on 98.9% of goods between the two countries.

name: China-Nicaragua Free Trade Agreement
description: Signed in 2023 and entered into force in 2024 following Nicaragua switching recognition from Taiwan.

name: Japan-ASEAN Comprehensive Economic Partnership (AJCEP)
description: Framework agreement; individual country agreements phased in from 2008 onward.

name: Japan-Australia Economic Partnership Agreement (JAEPA)
description: Australia's first FTA with a top-five trading partner; significant agricultural and auto tariff cuts.

name: Japan-India Comprehensive Economic Partnership Agreement (CEPA)
description: Covers goods, services, investment, and IP; includes an early harvest for IT products.

name: Japan-UK Comprehensive Economic Partnership Agreement (CEPA)
description: Successor to EU-Japan EPA for post-Brexit UK; adds digital and data flow provisions.

name: India-UAE Comprehensive Economic Partnership Agreement (CEPA)
description: India's fastest-concluded FTA; covers goods, services, investment, and IP.

name: India-ASEAN Free Trade Agreement
description: Covers trade in goods; services agreement followed in 2015. Under review for upgrade.

name: India-South Korea Comprehensive Economic Partnership Agreement (CEPA)
description: Covers goods, services, and investment; upgrade negotiations launched in 2021.

name: India-Sri Lanka Free Trade Agreement
description: India's first bilateral FTA; significantly reduces tariffs on goods.

name: India-Mauritius Comprehensive Economic Cooperation and Partnership Agreement (CECPA)
description: India's first trade deal with an African country; covers goods, services, and investment.

name: India-UK Free Trade Agreement
description: Concluded in May 2025 after three years of negotiations; awaiting ratification.

name: Australia-New Zealand Closer Economic Relations (ANZCERTA)
description: One of the world's most comprehensive bilateral FTAs; free movement of goods, services, and people.

name: Australia-Singapore Free Trade Agreement (SAFTA)
description: First FTA for both countries; upgraded in 2017 with digital economy provisions.

name: Australia-United States Free Trade Agreement (AUSFTA)
description: Broad bilateral deal covering goods, services, investment, and government procurement.

name: Australia-India Economic Cooperation and Trade Agreement (ECTA)
description: First FTA between the two countries; interim agreement covering goods and services.

name: Pacific Agreement on Closer Economic Relations Plus (PACER Plus)
description: Development-focused trade agreement for Pacific Island nations.

name: Pacific Alliance
description: Deep integration agreement; free movement of goods, services, capital, and people.

name: Andean Community (CAN)
description: Customs union with free movement of goods, people, and capital.

name: Chile-Canada Free Trade Agreement
description: Covers goods, services, and investment; one of Chile's earliest bilateral FTAs.

name: Chile-Japan Economic Partnership Agreement
description: Japan's first EPA in Latin America; covers goods, services, and investment.

name: EFTA-Chile Free Trade Agreement
description: Broad bilateral deal between EFTA states and Chile covering goods, services, and IP.

name: EFTA-South Korea Free Trade Agreement
description: Eliminates tariffs on most goods; includes services, investment, and IP.

name: EFTA-Singapore Free Trade Agreement
description: Comprehensive agreement with strong services and investment provisions.

name: EFTA-India Trade and Economic Partnership Agreement (TEPA)
description: Concluded in March 2024; includes a landmark $100bn investment commitment from EFTA to India.

name: South Asian Free Trade Area (SAFTA)
description: SAARC-based agreement to reduce intra-regional tariffs; implementation has been slow.

name: Common Market for Eastern and Southern Africa (COMESA)
description: Economic integration bloc for eastern and southern Africa; aims for a full common market.

name: East African Community (EAC) Customs Union
description: Customs union with a common external tariff; common market protocol entered force in 2010.

name: Southern African Customs Union (SACU)
description: World's oldest customs union; members share a common external tariff and revenue pool.

name: Economic Community of West African States (ECOWAS) Trade Liberalisation Scheme
description: Enables free movement of goods among member states; full customs union still in progress.

name: Tripartite Free Trade Area (TFTA)
description: Combines three African regional blocs; signed 2015, pending sufficient ratifications.

name: Eurasian Economic Union (EAEU)
description: Customs union and common market for Eurasian countries; successor to the Eurasian Customs Union.

name: EAEU-Vietnam Free Trade Agreement
description: First EAEU FTA with a non-CIS country; reduces tariffs on a wide range of goods.

name: EAEU-Iran Temporary Trade Agreement
description: Interim preferential trade agreement; full FTA negotiations ongoing.

name: EAEU-Serbia Free Trade Agreement
description: Preferential trade deal granting Serbian goods access to the EAEU market.

name: Trans-Pacific Strategic Economic Partnership (P4)
description: Forerunner to CPTPP; small multilateral agreement with zero tariffs on most goods.

name: Digital Economy Partnership Agreement (DEPA)
description: World's first standalone digital trade agreement; covers e-commerce, data flows, and AI.

name: Singapore-Australia Free Trade Agreement (SAFTA)
description: Covers goods, services, investment, and people movement; upgraded in 2017.

name: India-MERCOSUR Preferential Trade Agreement
description: Limited preferential deal covering around 450 tariff lines; upgrade under discussion.

name: Canada-Ukraine Free Trade Agreement (CUFTA)
description: Modernised version signed in 2023 with expanded services and labor provisions; in force 2024.

name: Canada-Chile Free Trade Agreement (CCFTA)
description: Long-standing bilateral agreement eliminating tariffs on most goods.

name: Canada-Colombia Free Trade Agreement
description: Provides preferential access for goods; includes labor and environment side agreements.

name: Canada-Peru Free Trade Agreement (CPFTA)
description: Eliminates tariffs on most goods; includes investment and IP provisions.

name: Canada-Jordan Free Trade Agreement
description: Covers goods, services, and investment; part of Canada's broader Middle East engagement.

name: Canada-Morocco Free Trade Agreement
description: Negotiations launched in 2023; aimed at boosting trade and investment ties.

name: India-Canada Comprehensive Economic Partnership Agreement (CEPA)
description: Paused in 2023 amid diplomatic tensions; no timeline for resumption confirmed.

name: Indonesia-Australia Comprehensive Economic Partnership Agreement (IA-CEPA)
description: Eliminates tariffs on most goods; significant market access for Australian services.
